title: Channel Model Turn Baseline
objective: Install the deterministic Kova channel, run real inbound channel events through the OpenClaw agent/model path with a mock provider, and verify channel sends, receipts, timing, duplicate-send behavior, and terminal returns per model-turn case.

phases.title: Provision Channel Model Turn Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw environment without starting the gateway so Kova mock auth and the test channel plugin are installed before plugin discovery.

phases.title: Install Kova Channel Plugin
phases.intent: Install the deterministic Kova channel plugin through the user-visible plugin install path before gateway startup.

phases.title: Start Gateway With Kova Channel
phases.intent: Start the OpenClaw gateway after mock auth and plugin installation so the channel and model provider are discovered through the normal runtime path.

phases.title: Run Text Final Model Turn
phases.intent: Call the Kova channel plugin over Gateway RPC so OpenClaw handles one inbound text-final channel event, calls the mock provider, sends a final text response through the channel adapter, and records reply/hook/terminal invariants.

phases.title: Run Media Final Model Turn
phases.intent: Call the Kova channel plugin over Gateway RPC so OpenClaw handles one inbound media-final channel event, calls the mock provider, sends generated media through the channel adapter, and records media preservation, receipt, duplicate, and terminal invariants.

phases.title: Run Thread Final Model Turn
phases.intent: Call the Kova channel plugin over Gateway RPC so OpenClaw handles one inbound threaded channel event, calls the mock provider, sends a final response through the channel adapter, and records thread preservation and terminal invariants.

phases.title: Run Silent Final Model Turn
phases.intent: Call the Kova channel plugin over Gateway RPC so OpenClaw handles one inbound silent-final channel event, calls the mock provider, sends a final response through the channel adapter, and records silent delivery and terminal invariants.

phases.title: Post-Channel-Model-Turn Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after the channel model turn.
